rows.label: qev070305_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Damn it! Those guys!
It seems they cut the Mirarian's power lines
so I couldn't escape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0002
rows.name:
Sorry... It's going to take a little time to repair.
Keep watch around here for a while...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0003
rows.name:
Doctor B...
You don't need to repair that...
You don't need something like that anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0004
rows.name:
The place you're going next
is a VIP room with free admission,
which you can reach instantly with just this single bullet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hmph, I have no interest in such a place.
I have many things I must do.
If you want to go, you can go there by yourself in your free time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Scientists are a sad bunch.
Even though you can peer into the profound depths of complex science,
you cannot see the fact of death approaching right before your eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hah! Do you think a flimsy BLADE like that
can defeat my partner, Dolba the Destroyer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0008
rows.name:
If it's [ST:playername ], the bodyguard you prepared
will be no match.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0009
rows.name:
First of all, the one who knows their strength best
is you yourself, who has been defeated over and over again, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0010
rows.name:
I see...
Then I'll let them make a choice.
Because life is simply a continuous series of choices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0011
rows.name:
The first path is to kill Doctor B
and pledge loyalty to me, Gud-sama...
I am a generous man. I might forgive you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0012
rows.name:
The second path is to become the main star
of Dolba the Destroyer's murder show alongside Doctor B...
Unlike me, he won't let you die easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0013
rows.name: ...Now, which is better?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_JNK0010
rows.name: Third Option[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_SEL0011
rows.name: Make him pay for his crimes with force.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_JNK0020
rows.name: Fourth Option[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_SEL0021
rows.name: Forgive Gud with a heart of mercy and persuade him to build a wonderful future together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0014
rows.name:
So words don't get through to fools after all.
Then... let the murder show begin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0015
rows.name:
Reaching that level of foolishness is an art form!
As thanks for showing me something good,
I will perform a murder show for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Dolba the Destroyer!
With your absolute, overwhelming power,
take these guys to the VIP room![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0017
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]...
We will return alive, no matter what![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070305_MSG0018
rows.name:
And then... we'll mass-produce new products in NLA
and make a huge profit!
Do not forgive anyone who interferes with my business![ST:wait ]
